title: Flavorful Australian Shrimp Skewers
description: A romantic Australian dish featuring succulent shrimp, infused with citrusy flavors and a velvety texture, perfect for a special occasion. This high-protein friendly recipe is ideal for a dinner date.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together cornstarch, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the shrimp sit in the marinade for 10 minutes to brine dry.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and cook for 8 minutes, turning occasionally.
Check the shrimp for doneness and cook for an additional 2 minutes if necessary.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh parsley.
